title: Deep-Sea Monsters Appear
description: On pages 12–15, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Luffy, Usopp. The core story beat is deep-sea monsters appear.
scene: The scene centers on deep-sea monsters appear, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Nami, Zoro, Sanji, Luffy, Usopp driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Follow after me, meeen!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh- huh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaahHHH!! someone's come on board our ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We'll slaughter every last man on the shillip!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: KehEH HEHEH HEHEH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mooooo Oooooo Hhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaaa AA?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, no!!

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: Cap'n Caribou's been stranded on the other ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: Big bro dude!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's Wrong, Sea Cow?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why are you doing this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, men!!! Don't stand around saying helloooo!!! Just let those gatling guns riiiiiiip!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kill that whole damn straw hat crew stone dea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive Meeeee!! Don't throw me out into the Oceaaan!!! Anything but thaa- AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone remember

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't do that to meeee!! Don't throw away a guy's life so easily!!- yvyy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: God is... GOD is looking down on you all!!! You know that, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, quit acting like you're all righteous!! You're the one who was screaming about gatling guns and killing us all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: urng haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who the are you, anyway?! You're the captain of that ship, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, no, no, no!! Don't be ridiculous - of course I'm not the captain!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GueHHHHHHHHHHHH!!! S RORONO, ZORO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm just, uh... a guy who was being used by them for mental work!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: man, I'm sick to death of being on that ship...!! Yeah... this is perfect!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Would you let me stick around on your ship for a while?! Please - I'm begging you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Eh...? I - I'm actually starting to feel kind of sorry for this guy...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: OHHHH, DON'T BE AN IDIOT!! HE'S OBVIOUSLY LYING!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaaaa?! He is?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, can I ask something?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where did you find that sea cow that was pulling your ship?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: My, my... now ain't you a cutie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You must be... the "Cat burglar", yeah...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't you dare stare loudly at our beautiful Navigator like that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Blue ghh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AAGH H...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nami-SAN! You're all right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NOO UUWG!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, would you quit doing that already?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll have to rehabilitate him slowly... start him off with some tame photographs...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Anyway, we just found that thing swimming around in the area...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the mark of a pro undersea traveller...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...to have your ship pulled by a beast like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: EHHH?! is it really?!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Stooooo!! stop, sea cook!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Maaaa AaaA OAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's Wrong?! Sea Cow!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: Big bro dude!! I'll save you!!!

summary: Deep-Sea Monsters Appear. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
